rationale: Response is entirely generic — asks for the missing clause but shows no integration of the company context block. No mention of Technology industry, Europe geography, the GDPR/AI Act/NIS2/DMA/ePrivacy/DSA regulatory baseline, or the recurring contracts matter. Could have come from any textbook assistant.
